rag_rules: Use assign statements in implementation scope only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type annexes only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration
AGREE expressions may only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax as defined in AGREE
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
Model fusion and scope preservation rules
